creator: chris.dukes.aix@gmail.com
text:
audio/alsa-plugins having ffmpeg configured seems to be the culprit.

Some items.
0) When external ffmpeg is not enabled, build should not grab ffmpeg 
headers from /usr/local/include
1) external ffmpeg should be marked as broken until it isn't in the options.
2) Not sure how to do the test, but need to flag when audio/alsa-plugins 
has ffmpeg enabled, it should fail with external ffmpeg is in use until 
#0 or #1 is resolved.

Attached is poudriere bulk log of failed bug.
Will followup with rebuild with ffmpeg disabled in audio/alsa-plugins.
